statusLine.command: input=$(cat); d=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // empty'); m=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // empty'); p=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); out="$d"; [ -n "$m" ] && out="$out | $m"; [ -n "$p" ] && out="$out | Context: ${p}% remaining"; echo "$out"

hooks.command: input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -qE 'git\s+commit\b'; then echo "$input" | powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ".claude/hooks/pre-commit-check.ps1"; fi
echo '文件已修改，请确认是否需要运行 lint/test'
echo '验收提醒：请确认输出包含 1)变更摘要 2)验证结果 3)风险点'

powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "[System.Media.SystemSounds]::Asterisk.Play(); Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms,System.Drawing; $n=New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $n.Icon=[System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $n.BalloonTipTitle='Claude Code'; $n.BalloonTipText='任务完成，请确认结果'; $n.BalloonTipIcon='Info'; $n.Visible=$true; $n.ShowBalloonTip(5000); Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $n.Dispose()"

powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "[System.Media.SystemSounds]::Asterisk.Play(); Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms,System.Drawing; $n=New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $n.Icon=[System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $n.BalloonTipTitle='Claude Code'; $n.BalloonTipText='子智能体任务完成，请确认结果'; $n.BalloonTipIcon='Info'; $n.Visible=$true; $n.ShowBalloonTip(3000); Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $n.Dispose()"
